# FilamentHub

> FilamentHub is a platform for managing 3D-printing materials and slicer settings, tightly integrated with OrcaSlicer. It hosts a community catalog of filament presets, a print-cost calculator with client quotes and a lightweight CRM, and one-click preset sync into OrcaSlicer.

Key capabilities:

- Community filament catalog — brands, filament lines, colors, and shareable OrcaSlicer presets recommended per printer.
- Print-cost calculator — parses G-code, resolves materials, computes cost, and generates commercial quotes (PDF) with a lightweight CRM for studios and sole proprietors.
- OrcaSlicer integration — import/export filament presets, printer and process profiles, and QR labels for spools.
- Multilingual interface (Russian, English, Chinese).

## Explore (public)

- [Catalog](https://filamenthub.ru/): filament brands, lines, colors, and presets.
- [Knowledge base](https://filamenthub.ru/wiki): guides on materials, printing, and slicer settings.
- [Print-cost calculator](https://filamenthub.ru/calculator): estimate print cost and build client quotes.
- [Downloads and OrcaSlicer plugin](https://filamenthub.ru/download): connect FilamentHub to OrcaSlicer.
